title: Sweet and Vibrant Venezuelan Peppers Wrap
description: A rich and springy Venezuelan dish featuring sweet red peppers, perfect for a quick and easy lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: red bell peppers
ingredients.notes: any sweet red pepper variety works

ingredients.name: plantain leaves
ingredients.notes: fresh or frozen, thawed and patted dry

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: flaky sea salt or kosher salt

instructions: Preheat a steamer basket over boiling water.
Rinse the plantain leaves and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together the cooked quinoa, black beans, onion, garlic, tomato paste, cumin, paprika, and salt.
Place a plantain leaf on a flat surface and spoon some of the quinoa mixture onto the center of the leaf.
Add some diced red peppers on top of the quinoa mixture.
Fold the bottom half of the plantain leaf up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients and leaves.
Steam the wraps for 5-7 minutes, or until the leaves are tender and the filling is heated through.
Serve the wraps hot, garnished with chopped cilantro and a drizzle of peanut oil.
